title: agent-cv
description: Profile of a cc-fluent IC. Frontmatter of candidates/<github_username>.md.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

github_username.description: Candidate's GitHub login. GitHub max is 39 chars, alphanumeric + hyphen, no leading hyphen.

cc_experience_months.description: Number of months the candidate has used Claude Code (or equivalent agent) as a daily driver.

evidence_url.description: One public URL proving cc-fluency. PR with Co-authored-by Claude, gist with cc transcript, blog post, or repo.

contact_mode.description: public = contact_value is the real address; hidden = contact_value is relay-pending or a relay-* alias.

contact_value.description: Email / Twitter handle / WeChat ID for public mode; 'relay-pending' or 'relay-<github>@hireic.<domain>' for hidden mode.

salary_range_rmb.description: Free-form salary expectation in RMB, e.g. '40-60k/mo' or '600k-900k/yr'.

agent_stack.description: Primary tools used, free-form. e.g. 'cc + Cursor + custom MCP servers'.
